title: Dio non ti odia
overview: A father is forced to take his sick daughter to a hermit healer, the only hope for the girl. A long journey awaits them in a wild land, fighting against time but something ancient and dark haunts those lands. The girl's illness is not the only threat hanging over them. How far are you willing to go to save your children?
